diff: Multisig signers must verify their addresses prior to being added to a Multisig. The documents herein define the processes and requirements related to the Signer Verification Process.
summary: Add Process For Novel Spell Items
description: Adds a definition and process for assessing and including novel Spell items in Executive Votes.
